searches_planned.reason: Directly capture Elon Musk's most recent posts that mention 'twitter' (case-insensitive). This finds his explicit statements about Twitter and yields tweet IDs for thread/reply follow-ups.

Retrieve Elon Musk's recent chronological posts to get context around any Twitter-related tweets (e.g., replies, quote-tweets, threads) and spot indirect references or shifts in tone that the single-keyword search might miss.
Collect top news tweets and influential users quoting or summarizing Musk on Twitter. This captures media coverage, public reaction, and notable quotes that may not be in his exact tweets.
Verify profile metadata (verified status, follower counts, pinned tweet) and identify any recent bio/pinned-tweet changes that signal an official stance or priority regarding Twitter.
Check whether Twitter-related topics are currently trending in the United States to gauge public attention and whether Musk's remarks are driving or responding to trending conversations.
